items.content_html: This plugin allows you to set default source mode for specific Markdown files in Obsidian. It adds a context menu option and a command to toggle the default view mode between source and rendered view for individual files. 该插件允许你为 Obsidian 中的特定 Markdown 文件设置默认源码模式。它添加了一个右键菜单选项和一个命令，用于在源码模式和渲染模式之间切换单个文件的默认视图模式。
items.title: seyeeL/obsidian-source-mode: This plugin allows you to set default source mode for specific Markdown files in Obsidian. It adds a context menu option and a command to toggle the default view mode between source and rendered view for individual files.  该插件允许你为 Obsidian 中的特定 Markdown 文件设置默认源码模式。它添加了一个右键菜单选项和一个命令，用于在源码模式和渲染模式之间切换单个文件的默认视图模式。

items.content_html: Jupyter > Visual Studio > Obsidian When copying code from .md files in Visual Studio into Obsidian, extra newlines are added, making notes super long. This simple plugin replaces >=N number of multiple empty lines with 1 or 2 empty lines, with preview and undo functions.
items.title: WillLewis/newline-adjuster: Jupyter > Visual Studio > Obsidian When copying code from .md files in Visual Studio into Obsidian, extra newlines are added, making notes super long. This simple plugin replaces >=N number of multiple empty lines with 1 or 2 empty lines, with preview and undo functions.
